payload.text: The subtitles have diferent fontds and sizes. I like the font below the Novus Ecosystem if you can correct the others please.                                                            - The Novus Ecosystem page can space a liitle lower so it wont  be visible the page above.

**Analyzing Font Discrepancies** I've been examining the font inconsistencies in the subtitles. I've pinpointed the preferred font style, specifically the one beneath "THE NOVUS ECOSYSTEM" with its `text-gray-500 text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] leading-relaxed font-bold tracking` attributes. The aim is to achieve a more cohesive and visually pleasing typography. **Refining Subtitle Styles** I'm now diving deeper into refining the subtitle styles. I'm noting specific attribute differences across sections, such as the distinct typography variations in the "Mission" section compared to the "Articles" section. I've also noted that the "Novus Ecosystem" section requires spacing adjustments. **Standardizing Subtitle Formatting** I'm making progress in standardizing the subtitle formats. I've successfully identified the preferred style - `text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] leading-relaxed font-bold tracking-[0.3em] uppercase opacity-70 text-gray-500` - and am now implementing it across all sections. I'm focusing on "Hero," "About," and "Articles" currently. Also, I'm working to lower the "Novus Ecosystem" section. I'm considering adjusting either `scroll-mt` or padding for that section. I will check the `gap` settings of the main container if this does not work. **Adjusting Vertical Spacing** I'm now focusing on the vertical spacing, particularly for the "Novus Ecosystem" section. I've analyzed `App.tsx` and am now considering increasing the `gap` settings of the parent container, specifically for the "ecosystem" section. This will address the visibility issue described by the user. I'm also assessing the impact of the `scroll-mt-24` setting. I need to ensure that the GlobalTrending subtitle style updates propagate correctly to `GlobalTrending.tsx`. I will also check and verify `Ecosystem.tsx` and `Contact.tsx`. **Implementing Subtitle Changes** I'm now implementing the standardized subtitle class: `text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] text-gray-500 font-bold tracking-[0.3em] uppercase opacity-70`. I will apply it to the `

` tags in `Hero.tsx`, `About.tsx`, `Articles.tsx`, and `GlobalTrending.tsx`. I will also create a reusable set of Tailwind classes based on the preferred style in `Ecosystem.tsx` and start working to apply it for a more consistent feel. Lastly, I will review and update any instances in `Ecosystem.tsx` and `Contact.tsx`. I am also working on adding custom spacing to `App.tsx` and/or `Ecosystem.tsx`. **Applying Style Consistently** I'm now focusing on applying the preferred style guide across several components: `Hero.tsx`, `About.tsx`, `Articles.tsx`, and `GlobalTrending.tsx`. I will adjust the ecosystem section's spacing in `App.tsx` by adding `pt-20 md:pt-32` to the section element. My goal is to use the `gray-500 mb-10 max-w-lg mx-auto animate-fade-in-up font-bold tracking-[0.3em] uppercase opacity-70` style. **Harmonizing Font Styles** I'm now zeroing in on harmonizing all subtitles to the desired style: `text-gray-500 text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] leading-relaxed font-bold tracking-[0.3em] uppercase opacity-70 mb-8`. I will apply this to `Hero.tsx`, `About.tsx`, `Articles.tsx`, and make `App.tsx` adjustments for spacing. I'll verify `Contact.tsx`, and will check subtitle consistency in `GlobalTrending.tsx`. I have confirmed font-family consistency; weight and tracking vary.

### Specification Updates

1.  **Subtitle Harmonization**: All major section subtitles (Hero, About/Mission, Articles, Global Trending, and Contact) will be updated to match the style of the "Novus Ecosystem" subtitle. This style uses:
    *   **Size**: `text-[10px]` (mobile) to `text-[11px]` (desktop).
    *   **Weight**: `font-bold`.
    *   **Letter Spacing (Tracking)**: `tracking-[0.3em]` (wide).
    *   **Case**: `uppercase`.
    *   **Opacity**: `opacity-70`.
    *   **Color**: `text-gray-500`.
2.  **Ecosystem Section Spacing**: To prevent the previous section (Global Trending) from being visible when viewing the Ecosystem section, I will increase the top padding and scroll margin of the Ecosystem section. This provides a "clean break" between the two sections.
3.  **Visual Consistency**: Ensuring all headers and their respective descriptive text blocks follow the same hierarchy across the entire landing page.

---

entries.description: Increase spacing for the Ecosystem section to ensure a clean visual break from the previous section.
Harmonize the Hero subtitle font style with the Ecosystem section.
Harmonize the About/Mission subtitle font style with the Ecosystem section.
Harmonize the Articles subtitle font style with the Ecosystem section.
Harmonize the Global Trending subtitle font style with the Ecosystem section.
